title: Order relative to authorizing the joint committee on Cannabis Policy, to make an investigation and study of certain current Senate documents relative to cannabis policy matters.

abstracts.abstract: Senate, December 8, 2025 -- The committee on Cannabis Policy, to whom was referred the petitions (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 86) of Jason M. Lewis and Manny Cruz for legislation to support cannabis equity businesses by creating a searchable online database of all operational cannabis dispensaries; and (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 92) of Patrick M. O'Connor for legislation relative to medical marijuana oversight, report the accompanying Order  (Senate, No. 2817).

actions.description: Reported from the committee on Cannabis Policy
Order reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

related_entities.name: committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently
the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

actions.description: Discharged to the committee on Senate Rules
